title: FPSMaster
description:
A pvp client, which provides common pvp utilities, like sprint, motionblur, autogg and etc.
Along with fancy user-interface and music player.
body:
# FPSMaster Client
**FPSMaster** is a powerful all-in-one PvP utility mod, designed to give you a competitive edge while keeping everything lightweight and smooth. Think of it as a modular alternative to full PvP clients like **Lunar** or **Badlion**—but available right in your own mod setup.

With **50+ features** packed into a single mod, FPSMaster delivers both **performance boosts** and **PvP-focused tools**, including:

* **Vanilla performance optimizations** for massive FPS gains—often several times higher than default
* Essential PvP utilities like:

  * Toggle Sprint
  * Old 1.7 animations
  * AutoGG
  * FullBright
  * Particle and sound customization
  * In-game indicators (CPS, FPS, inventory status, and more)
* Built-in music player
* Dynamic blur effects
* Realistic item physics
* Free cosmetic items

Whether you’re looking for smoother gameplay, better visuals, or convenience features to keep you one step ahead, **FPSMaster** brings it all together—no extra client required.

# Links and Support
Github：https://github.com/FPSMasterTeam/FPSMaster
Official Website：https://fpsmaster.top/
